tagline: AI-powered data pipelines that build themselves
description: We're building the Zapier of data engineering. Point DataWeave at your data sources and it automatically generates, tests, and monitors your ETL pipelines. Currently in beta with 12 companies.
needText: We need 25 data teams to stress-test the pipeline generator before our public launch. Join the beta and you'll get white-glove onboarding.
problem: Data teams burn weeks hand-building and babysitting brittle ETL pipelines. The moment a source schema changes, everything silently breaks.
solution: DataWeave points an agent at your sources and auto-generates tested, self-healing pipelines — then monitors them so you don't have to.

updates.text: Shipped self-healing schema detection — beta churn dropped to zero this week.
Crossed $2K MRR with our first 12 design partners.

tagline: Carbon accounting for SMBs, not just Fortune 500s
description: Small businesses will soon face carbon reporting requirements but have zero tools built for them. GreenLedger automatically tracks emissions from existing accounting data. 340 on our waitlist.
needText: Looking for 10 small businesses willing to connect their accounting data and shape the first version with us.
problem: Carbon reporting rules are coming for SMBs, but every tool is priced and built for Fortune 500 sustainability teams.
solution: GreenLedger reads the accounting data you already have and auto-compiles audit-ready emissions reports — no consultant required.

updates.text: Hit 340 waitlist signups from two SMB owner communities.

tagline: Voice-to-chart for doctors that actually works
description: Doctors spend 2 hours a day on charting. MedScribe listens to patient conversations and generates structured medical notes in real-time. HIPAA compliant. Piloting with 3 clinics.
needText: Talking to healthcare-focused angels and funds to close $750K. Book a chat if clinical AI tooling is in your wheelhouse.
problem: Physicians lose ~2 hours a day to charting — the single biggest driver of burnout — and existing dictation tools still need heavy editing.
solution: MedScribe listens to the visit and produces a structured, HIPAA-compliant note in real time, with the doctor only reviewing, not typing.

updates.text: Signed LOIs with all 3 pilot clinics — moving to paid contracts next month.

tagline: AI code review that catches what linters miss
description: StackPilot reviews your PRs for business logic bugs, security vulnerabilities, and architectural anti-patterns. Not just style — actual bugs. Integrates with GitHub in 2 minutes.
needText: Growing 30% MoM and opening a $1.5M seed. Book a chat if you back developer tooling.
problem: Linters catch formatting; they miss the bugs that actually ship — broken business logic, security holes, architectural drift.
solution: StackPilot reasons about your PR like a senior engineer would, flagging real defects and integrating with GitHub in two minutes.

updates.text: Passed $8K MRR across 45 teams — net revenue retention now 118%.

tagline: Payroll for companies with globally distributed teams
description: Hiring globally is easy now. Paying globally is still a nightmare. NomadPay handles payroll, compliance, and taxes in 40+ countries from a single dashboard. Already processing $200K/month.
needText: Processing $200K/mo and expanding across MENA. Opening a $2M round — let's talk if fintech infra is your thesis.
problem: Hiring globally is solved; paying globally isn't. Founders juggle local processors, compliance, and tax filings in every country.
solution: NomadPay runs payroll, compliance, and taxes across 40+ countries from one dashboard.

updates.text: Crossed $200K/mo in processed payroll across 18 companies.

tagline: Swipe to find your adoptable pet match
description: Shelters have terrible UX. PetMatch lets you set preferences and browse adoptable pets near you. We partner with 50+ shelters and have facilitated 200 adoptions in 3 months.
needText: Expanding to new cities — join the waitlist to get PetMatch in your area and help us prioritize shelters near you.
problem: Shelter adoption flows are clunky and offline, so adoptable pets sit unseen while would-be adopters give up.
solution: PetMatch makes discovery delightful — set preferences, browse pets near you, and start an adoption in a tap.

updates.text: Hit 200 adoptions and 5K downloads across 50 partner shelters.

tagline: No-code platform for teachers to build interactive lessons
description: Teachers aren't developers but they need interactive content. EduForge lets any teacher drag-and-drop simulations, quizzes, and videos into engaging lessons. 800 teachers in our pilot program.
needText: Strong teacher pull (800 in pilot) but I'm non-technical. Seeking a founding engineer who wants to own the product. Equity, not a salary.
problem: Teachers want interactive lessons but can't code, so they fall back to static slides that don't engage students.
solution: EduForge is drag-and-drop: any teacher composes simulations, quizzes, and video into a lesson in minutes.

updates.text: 800 teachers in the pilot reached 15K students this term.

tagline: Real-time freight matching for Latin American logistics
description: 40% of trucks in LATAM drive empty. FreightFlow uses real-time demand signals to match cargo with available trucks. We've reduced empty miles by 30% for our first 25 carrier partners.
needText: Reduced empty miles 30% for 25 carriers at $50K MRR. Raising $1.2M to expand across Brazil — book a chat if LATAM logistics excites you.
problem: 40% of trucks in LATAM drive empty because matching cargo to capacity is still phone calls and spreadsheets.
solution: FreightFlow matches cargo with nearby available trucks in real time, cutting empty miles and lifting carrier revenue.

updates.text: Cut empty miles 30% for our first 25 carrier partners at $50K MRR.

tagline: A feed of indie side-projects you can fork, sponsor, or buy
description: Cool indie projects die in GitHub repos nobody discovers. Loophole is a short-video feed where builders demo a side project others can clone, sponsor, or acquire.
needText: Would devs browse a feed of small shippable side-projects to clone or buy? Join the waitlist if you'd use this.
problem: Great indie projects stay invisible inside GitHub repos with no distribution.
solution: A swipeable feed where builders demo a 30s clip of a side project others can fork, sponsor, or buy.

updates.text: Posted to Ideas — gathering signal before I build.

tagline: Turn your messy notes into a publishable draft
description: The hardest part of writing isn't the words — it's turning scattered notes into a structure that flows. Plotline proposes an outline and first draft you can argue with.
needText: Trying to learn if writers actually want this. Join the waitlist if a notes-to-draft tool would save you time.
problem: Writers stall not on words but on structure — turning a pile of notes into something that flows.
solution: Plotline ingests your raw notes and proposes an outline plus first draft you can edit, not a generic AI blob.

updates.text: Posted the idea — 310 signups in 48h. Validation looking real.

tagline: An AI that plans your week from your goals
description: People set goals but never translate them into a realistic week. Cadence auto-blocks your calendar from your goals and adapts as life slips.
needText: Looking for 30 people to try it for a week and tell me if it actually helped. Join the waitlist to be one of them.
problem: People set ambitious goals but never turn them into a realistic week, so the goals quietly die.
solution: Cadence auto-blocks your calendar from your goals and re-plans automatically when life gets in the way.

updates.text: Brainstormed and posted to Ideas today.
